hooks.command:
python -c "
import sys, os, re
cmd = os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT', '')
patterns = [
    r'rm\s+(-rf|-fr|-r\s+-f|-f\s+-r|--force)',
    r'git\s+push\s+--force',
    r'git\s+push\s+-f\b',
    r'git\s+reset\s+--hard',
    r'git\s+checkout\s+--\s',
    r'git\s+clean\s+.*-f',
    r'git\s+reflog\s+expire',
    r'DROP\s+TABLE',
    r'DROP\s+DATABASE',
    r'mkfs',
    r'dd\s+if=.*of=',
    r'chmod\s+000',
    r'sudo\s+rm',
]
if any(re.search(p, cmd, re.IGNORECASE) for p in patterns):
    print('BLOCKED: 위험한 명령어가 감지되었습니다.', file=sys.stderr)
    sys.exit(1)
"
